description: A customer reports that a shipment arrived with several damaged drums. The company needs to process the claim and send a replacement.

nodes.task_description: Log the customer complaint and ask for photos of the damage and a list of affected drums.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a complaint record and attaches the customer's photos.

nodes.task_description: File a claim with the freight carrier responsible for the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits a freight claim with the supporting evidence.

nodes.task_description: Create a no-charge replacement sales order to ship the damaged quantity again to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new sales order for the replacement material with a zero-dollar value.
